name: Roasted Tomato “Kopanisti”
servings: prep time: 5 minutes | cook time:30 minutes |serves 3

ingredients.item: crumbled manouri or ricotta salata cheese
roasted cherry or teardrop tomatoes (see Note)

method: Combine the garlic, feta, manouri, and yogurt in the bowl of a food processor and pulse to combine.
Add the roasted tomatoes, olive oil, lemon zest, and oregano and pulse until the mixture is a slightly chunky paste.
Transfer to a bowl or plastic container, cover, and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 1 week before serving. Serve as a dip with pita chips.
